The 'real UI outputs, not APIs' distinction is huge, API responses and what users actually see in ChatGPT or Claude can be surprisingly different.

As an indie maker who just launched STRIKE, I hadn't even thought about tracking how my app appears in AI responses, that's a blind spot I didn't know I had.

Does it work well for tracking a niche iOS app, or is it better suited for SaaS products with more web presence?

SEO informed you of your ranking & GEO tells you how you are described and that is the battle that matters now that buyers start their research in ChatGPT/Perplexity not Google. results.title: Justblank: Free AEO analytics with content tools to boost AI rankings | Product Hunt
results.content:
Multi-brand support: Each client can be set up as a separate brand inside JustBlank, with its own domain, competitors, prompts, and reports. You’re not limited to a single business.
 Client-specific AI visibility: For every brand, you can track how it appears in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and others, completely independently.
 Competitive analysis per client: You’ll see which competitors are being recommended for each client and which prompts they’re winning or losing.
 Actionable content guidance: The platform suggests exactly what content to create next for each brand to improve AI visibility, not just traditional SEO rankings. [...] On granularity: we go quite deep.

You can track prompt visibility at the individual prompt level, not just broad topics. That means:

 Specific keywords and long-tail questions in your niche
 Variations of how users actually ask those questions in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, etc.
 Whether your brand appears, how often, and in what context (recommended, compared, cited, or omitted)

You can also:

 Group prompts by intent (comparison, discovery, problem-solution, brand vs competitor)
 See prompt volume so you know which ones actually matter
 Track competitor co-mentions for the same keywords
 Map prompts to ICPs and content types, so you know exactly what to create next to improve visibility [...] Founders and marketers kept asking us things like:

 Why does ChatGPT recommend competitors but not us?
 Which prompts actually influence AI answers?
 How do we create content that AI models use, not just Google?

There wasn’t a good answer, so we built one.

### What JustBlank does

JustBlank shows how your brand appears across AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity, and more importantly, why.

You can:

 See where your brand shows up (or doesn’t) in AI answers
 Track which competitors are winning specific prompts
 Understand which prompts actually have volume and intent
 Create AI-optimized content designed to close those gaps

### What we’re launching today

Report

Sergey [...] Hi Product Hunt - I built PromptScout because founders and lean marketing teams are starting to lose discovery to AI answers they cannot see in normal SEO dashboards. Google rankings still matter, but they no longer tell the whole story. Buyers now ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity for recommendations, comparisons, and shortlists. If your brand is missing there, a page-one ranking may not be enough. PromptScout starts with a free technical AI-readiness audit because that is the cheapest useful first check: can AI crawlers access the site, can the page be extracted, are important pages discoverable, and what should be fixed before running visibility monitoring? Live AI visibility data is gated behind signup so PromptScout can save the brand, prompts, monitor runs,

results.title: Opttab: Manage your presence in AI search
results.content:
👋 Hey Product Hunt! Super excited to finally launch Opttab here 🚀 Opttab is an AI Visibility, AI Search Analytics & Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform that helps brands, creators, and teams understand, improve, and control how they appear inside AI answers like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity and more. In simple terms: If someone asks an AI “What’s the best product, service etc?” — 👉 Do you show up? 👉 How are you described? 👉 Why (or why not)? Opttab helps you track that visibility, improve it with data-backed insights, and even control how AI models access your content. What makes Opttab different? AI Visibility & Ranking Tracking – See where and how your brand appears in AI-generated answers GEO Score & Optimization Insights – Clear actions to rank higher in AI search [...] Subscribe

Unlike traditional SEO tools, Opttab focuses on how AI models discover, interpret, rank, and reuse your content—giving you full transparency and control over your AI-facing digital footprint.

findable.

findable.Free marketing optimization for ChatGPT, Google AI, Claude [...] As someone deeply focused on LLM SEO, I find Findable to be an incredibly practical tool for the future of search. I work with brands to optimize for ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini, and I also train students in SEO through my own course. This tool is something I would definitely showcase to my students as a real-world example of how SEO is evolving beyond Google. Findable makes it much easier to understand how visible your brand is in AI search results and gives actionable ways to improve through content gap analysis, FAQ generation, and competitor insights. It bridges the gap between traditional SEO and AI-driven search, which is exactly what businesses need right now. For me as a practitioner, this is not just another SEO tool. It helps me adapt strategies for clients in a way
